summary: Iteration 36: Tested 2 bug fixes - (1) BookingPage with ?program=ID now correctly pre-selects program and jumps to calendar step 2, (2) Availability endpoint correctly expands time windows into individual slots based on program duration. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests confirmed both fixes working.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: BookingPage with ?program=ID now jumps to step 2 (calendar) - fixed by initializing step state based on URL parameter
BUG FIX 1 ROOT CAUSE: React StrictMode was causing double renders, resetting state. Fixed by using useState initializer function to read URL param
FEATURE 2 VERIFIED: Availability endpoint expands time windows into individual slots based on program duration
FEATURE 2 VERIFIED: 60min program with window 08:30-12:00 expands to 6 slots (08:30-09:30 through 11:00-12:00)
FEATURE 2 VERIFIED: 90min program with window 08:30-12:00 expands to 5 slots, last valid slot is 10:30-12:00 (NOT 11:00-12:30)
FEATURE 2 VERIFIED: Programs with exact slot definitions (like '09:00-10:30') are NOT expanded - kept as-is
Login flow works with httpOnly cookies
Programs page loads with 6 programs and feedback tab available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified: (1) BookingPage with ?program=ID now correctly pre-selects program and jumps to step 2 - fix was in useState initializer. (2) Availability endpoint correctly expands time windows into individual slots based on program duration with 30min intervals.

verified_features.feature: BUG FIX 1: BookingPage with ?program=ID pre-selects program and jumps to calendar
verified_features.details: Page correctly shows step 2 (calendar) when URL has program parameter, skips step 1 (program selection)

verified_features.feature: BUG FIX 1: Only selected program shown when URL has program parameter
verified_features.details: Program cards are NOT visible when program is preselected via URL

verified_features.feature: FEATURE 2: 90min program slot expansion with correct last slot
verified_features.details: Window 08:30-12:00 expands to 5 slots, last valid slot is 10:30-12:00 (11:00-12:30 would exceed window)

verified_features.feature: FEATURE 2: Exact slot programs NOT expanded
verified_features.details: Historická prohlídka with time_blocks=['09:00-10:30'] stays as 1 slot

verified_features.feature: Programs page loads with feedback tab
verified_features.details: 6 program cards displayed, feedback tab available in program edit dialog
Shows step 1 with all programs when no program parameter in URL

fix_applied.change: Changed useState(1) to useState(() => { const programParam = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('program'); return programParam ? 2 : 1; })
fix_applied.reason: React StrictMode was causing double renders which reset the step state. Using useState initializer function ensures the initial state is set correctly based on URL parameter before any re-renders.
